product_highlights: Klucel™ HPC (Hydroxypropylcellulose) — film-forming polymer for encapsulation and controlled release
Benecel™ HPMC — cellulosic excipient for sustained-release delivery matrices
Aquacoat® CPD — aqueous colloidal dispersion for active ingredient coating
Natrosol™ HEC — hydroxyethylcellulose polymer matrix for active suspension and delivery
notes: Ashland Global Holdings is a specialty chemicals company with one of the broadest portfolios of cellulosic polymers and film-forming excipients used in personal care delivery systems. Their Klucel™, Benecel™, and Natrosol™ polymer series are workhorses of cosmetic formulation, providing the delivery matrices that protect and control-release actives in lotions, serums, and leave-on treatments. Ashland's deep cellulosic expertise and sustained-release polymer technologies make them a fundamental SKIN-TWIN supplier reference for polymer-based active delivery architecture.
